title: binders full
body:
- ))}}
    - i am the vacuum's alesman
there is a nothing
i keep it's horn filled with something
foamy on top cuz underneath it's bubblin
waitin to pop if i don't keep em comin
    - heaven's an idea, my dear, it's right here between my ears
    - never use my shit to paint the wall
i'm trying  to stare close lose focus the smell throws me off
    - there's no thesis in my pieces
this is a piss in a stiff wind i'm facing some direction in relation to
    - you got a price you can name it
you got a life you can name it
you heard a song think the label was wrong
you can name it
you ain't gotta be famous to play all the parts
lemme say it again plain as i can
you can name it
but you can't not
you just ain't aiming when you take your hands off
the pen is mightier than the sword
call it a plowshare, say goodbye to the war
call it a night when i'm tired of fighting the world
dubbed by the weight on my shoulders
unimpressed by the lapels on the soldiers
no labels on my folders
cuz i play the accordion according to the structure i feel when i hold it
open to the moment
whatever's there i own it
    - gandalf hand off and off
    -
